title: astragalus cruentiflorus subsp. supranubias
intro: Astragalus cruentiflorus subsp. supranubias, also known as Chinese milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is valued in traditional Chinese medicine for its adaptogenic properties, which help the body adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and saponins, that have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, providing health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced blood pressure, and enhanced physical performance. Astragalus cruentiflorus subsp. supranubias is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, to support health and vitality.
